title: 9 Pieces Garden Tools Set, Gardening Hand Tool with 2-in-1 Storage Bag, Garden Hand Tools with Non-Slip Handles, Heavy Duty Gardening Tools for Women & Men - Purple
features: A COMPLETE GARDEN TOOLS SET: Essential starter set for gardening lovers, This garden tool set contains everything you need for all your gardening work. This high quality garden tools set comes with everything needed for a successful planting.

GARDEN TOOLS WITH 2-IN-1 STORAGE BAG: Our heavy-duty storage bag can not only be carried by hand, but also used as a crossbody bag. Others can only be carried by hand. There are 9 slots for storing all tools to ensure you don't lose any tools and it is easy to carry.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE DESIGN: The anti slip rubber handle adopts ergonomic design, which can achieve a more comfortable and relaxed user experience, suitable for hands of different sizes. Great for seniors.
HIGH QUALITY GARDEN ACCESSORIES: All the garden tools are made from high quality stainless steel that won't rust, won't crack like wood quality do. Easy to use and clean.

PERFECT GIFT FOR WOMEN MEN: This garden tools set bag makes a perfect present for wedding, housewarming, birthdays, Fathers's Day, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day or Christmas and other holidays. Top gift to parents, gardening hobbist and any friends.

Not for sale to persons under 18 years of age. Proof of age and a signature will be required on delivery. Keep out of reach of children. Wear appropriate gloves when using. Do not use for purposes other than intended (gardening tasks).
